capabilities.name: Categories/tags
capabilities.notes: Tags are admin-UI only (no tag skill); categories have both surfaces.

capabilities.name: Scheduled publishing
capabilities.verify: publish_scheduled_content skill (rpc:publish_scheduled_pages); SchedulePublishDialog.tsx + Scheduled badge in BlogPostsTab.tsx

capabilities.name: SEO meta
capabilities.notes: Skill surface missing — manage_blog_posts exposes no SEO meta params; seo_content_brief only generates briefs.

capabilities.name: Comments
capabilities.verify: no comment table, skill, or UI for blog posts

capabilities.name: RSS feed
capabilities.verify: blog-rss edge function + RSS toggle in BlogSettingsTab.tsx
capabilities.notes: Skill surface missing — no RSS skill in blog-module skillSeeds.

capabilities.name: Author pages
capabilities.verify: no author archive route or skill
capabilities.notes: AuthorCard.tsx shows a bio on posts, but no dedicated author pages.

capabilities.name: AI-written posts via operator
capabilities.verify: write_blog_post skill in blog-module skillSeeds (plus research_content, generate_content_proposal)

capabilities.name: Social post generation from content
capabilities.verify: generate_social_post + social_post_batch skills in blog-module skillSeeds
